message:
fix(buffer): handle poisoned mutex gracefully instead of panicking

Replace `unwrap()` with `unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner())` when
acquiring the inner mutex, so that a prior panic in another thread
does not propagate a PoisonError to all subsequent callers. The
buffer contents are still valid after a panic — the mutex is just
marked poisoned — so recovering the inner value is safe and keeps
the service operational.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
